overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game showing a character walking through a vibrant night-time Asian-inspired market. The scene features neon lighting, holographic cherry blossom trees, food stalls, and bustling NPC crowds in a futuristic urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic tree and food carts

approaching the covered walkway entrance at the far end of the plaza

agents.ego_description: character in red outfit walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza toward the market entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing by blue food cart with glowing display
group of pedestrians gathered near the illuminated tree

bright red illuminated carpet running through the center of the plaza
tall building with green-tinted windows and red neon signage
food vendor cart with blue body and red-yellow umbrella

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a glowing red carpet through an open plaza at night. An illuminated cherry blossom tree stands prominently in the center while a blue food cart operates on the left. Neon signs adorn the surrounding buildings as the character approaches a covered entrance.

lighting shifts to darker ambient with purple neon accent lights

agents.ego_description: character walking through covered corridor approaching the main market hall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with orange hair walking ahead toward the market entrance

entered.detail: green carpeted flooring covering the walkway surface
large structural concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
purple neon tube lights running along the ceiling
multi-level escalator system with blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway with green carpeted flooring, transitioning from the open plaza. Purple neon tubes illuminate the path ahead while concrete pillars line the left side. The escalator structure becomes visible in the distance as the character moves deeper into the complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level indoor market atrium with descending stairs

beginning descent down wide concrete staircase into lower level

large digital screen displaying advertisements above the market floor
wide concrete staircase leading down to the lower market level

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast multi-level indoor market atrium. Large yellow industrial pipes dominate the right side while a digital billboard glows above. The character descends a wide concrete staircase into the lower level where crowds of pedestrians move about.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower market level with food stalls and hanging lanterns

events.description: steam vent releases puff of vapor in the market aisle
passing under dense cluster of red lanterns creating red ambient glow

agents.ego_description: character walking through the market aisle passing various vendor stalls and shoppers

pedestrian sitting on bench near market stall

entered.detail: rustic wooden vendor stall with corrugated metal roof
strings of red paper lanterns hanging across the market ceiling
floor vent periodically releasing steam into the aisle
wooden market stall with large red sign reading WAGAMI MARKET

segments.scene_description: The character explores the lower market level, walking beneath strings of red paper lanterns. Steam vents release periodic puffs of vapor along the concrete walkway. The WAGAMI MARKET stall becomes visible on the right while various vendors occupy wooden stalls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market aisle with food stalls on both sides

passing close to vendor stall temporarily blocking view of the aisle ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking past the WAGAMI MARKET and continuing through the narrow market corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower section of the market with closely packed stalls. The WAGAMI MARKET stall is passed on the right while vendors work at their counters. A blue food stall with green stools becomes visible ahead as the character navigates the confined aisle.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate food stall area with blue counter and neon lighting

events.description: slowing approach to final blue food stall
vendor turns to face the counter inside the stall

agents.ego_description: character approaching and stopping near the blue food stall to observe the vendor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a blue food stall at the end of the market aisle. The vendor with pink hair works behind a metal mesh screen, preparing food at a concrete counter with green stools. Purple neon lighting illuminates the intimate stall area as the character stops to observe.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit plaza into the dense, atmospheric depths of a multi-level indoor market. It begins with the character walking along a glowing red carpet past an illuminated cherry blossom tree and blue food cart before transitioning into a covered walkway defined by green carpeting and purple neon tubes. The scene then expands into a vast atrium dominated by yellow industrial pipes and digital billboards, leading the camera down a wide concrete staircase into a bustling lower level. As the character moves beneath strings of red paper lanterns and puffs of steam, the environment shifts from an open hall to a narrow aisle of wooden vendor stalls. Finally, the path culminates at an intimate blue food stall where a pink-haired vendor works behind a metal mesh screen under a soft purple glow.
